AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE THAT FUNDS WERE RECEIVED BY A DEFENDANT FOR USE AND BENEFIT OF PLAINTIFF. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BURL STEVEN WALKER, IND. AND AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE UNDER THE DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED 2/5/04 DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OVERRULED. THE FIRST, SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. PLAINTIFF IS SUBROGATED TO THE RIGHTS OF THE BUYERS. A CLAIM FOR MONEY HAD AND RECEIVED IS AVAILABLE WHERE THE BUYERS PAID MONEY TO THE DEFENDANTS PURSUANT TO A VOID CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT MR. WALKER MADE THE NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATIONS TO THE BUYERS. WHETHER THERE WAS JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE ON THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATIONS IS A QUESTION OF FACT NOT AMENABLE TO RESOLUTION ON A DEMURRER.
